title: Petface Latex Banana Soft Chew Dog Toy, Small
features: FUN PLAY: Keep your dog entertained with this Small Latex Banana Soft Chew Toy, perfect for interactive outdoor training and exercise
FEATURES: Made from durable, strong latex material that is soft on gums and teeth for safe playtime fun
FUN SQUEAK: With a squeaker inside, your furry friend will be entertained by the playful sounds during playtime
BANANA FUN: The bright yellow design of the banana shape adds extra excitement to playtime sessions with your pup

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding accessories, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cat and wild birds for great products! Petface Latex Banana Dog Toy Petface Latex Banana Dog Toy is ideal for interactive play and will provide your dog or puppy with exercise and fun. Dogs are playful by nature and this toy is perfect for younger or older dogs as the soft latex is not too tough for them to play with. Available in both large and small sizes. Petface Latex Banana Dog Toy This toy is the pick of the BUNCH! The Petface Latex Banana will provide hours of fun for your pooch. Made with a durable latex material designed to be chewed and complete with a squeaker inside will make this latex fruit irresistible to your pooch and keep them busy and mentally stimulated BANANA SPLITS! Dogs are playful by nature and this toy is perfect for younger dogs or older dogs as the soft latex is not too tough for them to play with Ap-PEEL-ing for all dogs! There is a whole range of petface latex fruit and veg to choose from. With two different sizes, this toy is perfect for both small and large dogs alike.
